items.title: Design Uber's Data Model from Scratch | Complete Data Modeling Masterclass
items.author: Darshil Parmar
items.summary:
Learn Data Engineering and Crack Interview - https://datavidhya.com

Practice here - https://datavidhya.com/data-modeling/ride-sharing-cab-booking/

The skill that separates Mid-level Data Engineers from Seniors in 2026 isn't writing SQL or knowing Spark: It's data modelling. 

In this free 3 Hour masterclass, I walk through all 5 paradigms every Data Engineer needs to know (3NF, Star Schema, Data Vault, One Big Table, Document/NoSQL), when each one wins, and the anti-patterns that fail senior interviews. 

Then we design Uber's data model from scratch live, covering physical modeling, partitioning, and cost trade-offs. This is the masterclass I wish I had before my own 

👦🏻 My Linkedin - https://www.linkedin.com/in/darshil-parmar/
 📷 Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/datawithdarshil
🎯Twitter - https://twitter.com/parmardarshil07

🌟 Please leave a LIKE ❤️ and SUBSCRIBE for more AMAZING content! 🌟
